facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this bakery. Locals on Hùng Vương know better. Lan Chi Bakery is the kind of spot that fills up before most resorts serve breakfast. No English menu board. No tourist markup. Just fresh baked goods and a line that tells you everything. Find it at 8E-8F Hùng Vương, Phú Quốc. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Fresh out the oven, 8E-8F Hùng Vương. Lan Chi Bakery gets busy fast. This is what the locals on Hùng Vương grab before work. No frills, no resort prices, just the real thing. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.caption: Tourists keep walking past Lan Chi Bakery. Locals don't. 8E-8F Hùng Vương, Phú Quốc. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Locals grab from Lan Chi Bakery before tourists even wake up. Hùng Vương, Phú Quốc.

tiktok.caption: The bakery locals don't post about. Hùng Vương, Phú Quốc. Go early. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #PhuQuocTips
